name: fireclaude
description: Self-hosted Firecrawl Claude Code skill — scrape, crawl, search, extract, change tracking, webhook testing, model swap. No API keys.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
  fireclaude installed.
  Run the stack: ./install.sh
  Or: FIRECRAWL_INSTALL_DIR=~/.fireclaude/firecrawl ./install.sh
')"
